investigation_summary: Same underlying U.S. tobacco public record as Philip Morris legacy: DOJ RICO civil findings (fraudulent denial of risks, youth marketing, concealed research) and MSA document archive. Altria holds Marlboro domestically; Juul stake implosion; oral nicotine (on!, NJOY acquisitions). ~480k annual U.S. smoking deaths CDC.

profile.parent: Altria Group (NYSE: MO) — U.S. Marlboro; spun from PMI in 2008
profile.tax_summary: U.S. domicile — effective federal rate commonly 21–24% in filings. Brand IP licensing offshore elements reported in industry analyses.
profile.legal_summary: MSA signatory — continuing payments and marketing restrictions. DOJ RICO judgment binds U.S. majors including PM USA (Altria). Juul youth-vaping settlements statewide; Altria write-down ~$12.8B stake.
profile.labor_summary: Upstream leaf child-labor risk same as PMI — HRW country reports.
profile.environmental_summary: Butt litter / filter persistence same sector-wide issue.
profile.political_summary: ~$7.6M federal lobbying (2023 figure cited in source volume) — anti-regulation focus; menthol politics.
profile.product_health: Combustibles: established mass mortality. Modified-risk and reduced-harm claims heavily contested; FDA orders on specific SKUs should be checked primary.
profile.executive_summary: MSA depository documents at UCSF underpin executive knowledge timelines.
